title: MassTransit Saga State
description: Schema for MassTransit saga state machine instance data. Sagas coordinate long-running business processes across multiple services using a state machine pattern.

correlationId.description: Unique identifier that correlates all messages belonging to this saga instance

currentState.description: The current state of the saga state machine (e.g., Initial, Processing, Completed, Faulted)

version.description: Optimistic concurrency version for the saga instance

created.description: Timestamp when the saga instance was created

updated.description: Timestamp of the last state transition

rowVersion.description: Row version for database concurrency (Entity Framework)

expirationTokenId.description: Token ID for scheduled timeout events

faultedMessage.description: The message that caused the saga to fault, if applicable
